supersedes_root_deliverables.note: Deep code-grounded versions placed in this evidence folder supersede the thin root-level files committed in 1768037 (PR #532).
key_corrections: Old current_role_matrix understated the H-1 actor gate: /decision DOES block co on HIGH/VERY_HIGH (server.py:25353) and enforces dual-approval (server.py:25515).
ApprovalGateValidator (security_hardening.py:705) exists as a single precondition gate but contains no role/actor logic; actor gates are inline per-handler.
compliance_review exists; submitted_to_compliance does not exist anywhere (backend grep zero matches).
The real P0 is the PATCH /api/applications/:id path omitting actor gates, not generic 'analyst can approve everywhere'.

Post-review revision: PR sequence reordered to authority-gate-first (PR-APPROVAL-AUTHORITY-MATRIX-1 is PR1). Central gate is can_decide covering approve AND reject; PATCH reject divergence (analyst can reject) elevated alongside approve; gate-level blocked-attempt audit lives in PR1; broad audit hardening is PR4.

authority_enforcement_model.role_matrix_advisory_only: ROLE_PERMISSION_MATRIX server.py:13567-13588 (UI reference; not consulted at decision time)

P0.title: Final-decision bypass (approve AND reject) via PATCH /api/applications/:id; omits co-HIGH actor gate, dual-approval, and reject role-gate

P1.title: Decentralized authority logic; no single can_decide gate
Decorator-level role denials not audited (132 require_auth sites, 0 log_authz_denial)
PATCH status block branches drop governance audit
Memo-approve UI uses approve_low_medium (incl co); backend requires admin/sco

P2.title: co-HIGH gate keys on risk level only; PEP/EDD-at-MEDIUM blocked only indirectly
EDD PATCH decorator lists co (misleading; closure is SCO/admin-only)
UI authority gates use hardcoded role arrays (drift vs ROLE_PERMISSIONS)
analyst permitted screening first review while excluded from run/decision (confirm intent)

controls_verified_sound: screening second review SCO/admin-only + same-user block vs first reviewer (server.py:20779-20796); re-validated read-only at approval (security_hardening.py:356-375)
approval reads but never writes second-review state (no circular self-satisfaction)
authority evaluated against current risk (server.py:25351 live locked row)
portal wording neutral; no internal mechanics leaked (arie-portal.html:11199-11231)

recommended_prs.purpose: central can_decide gate (approve AND reject); block PATCH terminal bypass; gate-level blocked-attempt audit; admin-privileged AC
submit status/action/queue/audit; consumes same can_decide evaluator with package-readiness blocker subset
systemic audit: 132 decorator denials, override/waiver first-class events
full API/browser bypass + role-path validation incl reject-via-PATCH

central_gate.name: can_decide_application(user, application, decision, db)
central_gate.invariant: No terminal approved/rejected transition reachable except through this gate; PATCH terminal status removed or funneled through it.
central_gate.admin_high_risk: same gate as SCO, no shortcut, is_privileged_admin_action audit flag

scope_boundary: ROLE-AUTHORITY only; Periodic Review track (PR-PRS-A merged, PR-PRS-B in flight) untouched.
